features.name: function call in constant expression context
features.description: Code should include a function with only constant arguments called within a concatenation that is assigned to a constant signal

features.name: nested function calls with constant args in constant context
features.description: Code should include nested function calls where the outer function is called in a constant context but inner arguments are not constant

features.name: simple passthrough function in localparam assignment
features.description: Code should include a simple function that just assigns its input, used in a localparam constant assignment via concatenation
